description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that runs on every push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs on an ubuntu-20.04 environment to build Godot engine with various configurations, including different Godot versions, targets, and precision settings. For each job, check out the Godot repository and a custom module, set up a custom buildroot, load and upload a .scons_cache directory, and compile the engine with scons. Upload the resulting binaries as artifacts if production is enabled.
